owning_subsystem: workspace language/tooling baseline and internal async interface modernization
non_goals: Do not redesign product contracts as part of the edition uplift.
Do not remove object-safe async boundaries required for dyn dispatch in UI host APIs.
Do not perform unrelated feature work.
scope_in: Set the workspace edition to 2024 and remove local Edition 2021 overrides unless a tool-specific exception is proven necessary.
Fix compiler, formatter, clippy, and macro fallout introduced by the edition change.
Replace eligible internal BoxFuture-based trait methods with native async fn or RPITIT where dyn dispatch is not required.
Preserve boxed async interfaces for AppStateStore, PrefsStore, and closure-based UI host APIs.
scope_out: Removing object-safe boxed async boundaries needed by runtime host abstractions.
acceptance_criteria: The workspace builds, tests, and passes clippy with Edition 2024 enabled.
Local edition overrides are removed unless a proven exception remains necessary.
Eligible internal async interfaces are modernized without breaking trait-object boundaries that must stay boxed.
cargo verify-repo, cargo xtask verify profile ui, and cargo xtask ui-hardening all pass.
validation_artifacts: Passing fmt, clippy, verify-repo, UI verification, and UI hardening output
Committed async interface modernization limited to eligible internal traits
rollback_path: Revert the edition uplift, lockfile refresh, and async-interface modernization together so the workspace does not retain mixed edition or async-style assumptions.
